title: Envdetect package extraction + Aho-Corasick pre-filter
description:
Two infrastructure improvements specified in plan 02:

1. **Envdetect package**: Extract environment detection logic from internal/eval/pipeline.go into a dedicated internal/envdetect package. This enables structured environment-aware matching (CI detection, container detection, etc.) as specified in the architecture.

2. **Aho-Corasick pre-filter**: Replace the current lowercase substring scan pre-filter with the planned Aho-Corasick multi-pattern matcher for candidate selection. This is an algorithmic improvement for performance when many pack rules are registered.

These are P2 gaps from plan 02-matching-framework. Not blocking for pack implementations but important for matching the planned architecture.

comments.author: dcg-coder-2
comments.text: Implementation complete (0556d7e). envdetect package + Aho-Corasick pre-filter + pipeline integration. All existing tests pass. Awaiting review.
